content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Describe a computer investigation and the steps required to complete a case. Use appropriate tools for forensic investigations. Demonstrate an understanding of evidence preservation and authentication. Understand the basics and specifics of file systems. Understand how to perform a forensic analysis of the Windows system
Contenu de la matière
Chapter 1: Computer Forensics Fundamentals
Chapter 2: Evidence Collection & Data Seizure
Chapter 3: Computer Forensics Analysis and Validation
Chapter 4: Windows system and artifacts
Chapter 5: Current computer forensic tools
Chapter 6: Network Forensics /Email Analysis
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
Bill Nelson, Amelia Phillips, Christopher Steuart, “Guide to Computer Forensics and Investigations”, Fourth Edition, Course Technology.
Cory Altheide, Harlan Carvey, Digital Forensics with Open Source Tools, Syngress imprint of Elsevier.
MariE-Helen Maras, “Computer Forensics: Cybercriminals, Laws, and Evidence”, Jones & Bartlett Learning, 2nd Edition,
